sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 5

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 5:1
items.html:
(to the question) Esha Dachya [pure fire]
The five Gevurot [judgments] in Yesod of Ima that are clothed in the Daat of ZA are called Esha Dachya. (p. 747, Item 20)
